## Pages
- [About Us - MLM Public School](/aboutus): MLM Public School
- [Academics - MLM Public School](/academics): Blending convent education values with modern teaching methods. Comprehensive curriculum from Nursery to 5th grade.
- [Admissions - MLM Public School](/admissions): Apply for admission to MLM Public School. Enrollment for classes Nursery to 5th. Start your application today!
- [Contact Us - MLM Public School](/contact): Get in touch with MLM Public School in Sultanpur Ghosh, Khaga, Fatehpur. Visit us, call +91 8004438000, or send us a message.
- [Gallery - MLM Public School](/gallery): View actual campus, classroom, and play-area photographs from MLM Public School.
- [MLM Public School | Premium Academic Excellence](/home): MLM Public School offers a disciplined academic environment with modern facilities, dedicated teaching, and a supportive learning journey for every child.
